nodes.name: Chilean hawk
nodes.summary: Chilean hawk（Chilean hawk，学名 Astur chilensis），已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括温带森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

links.evidence: It breeds in Andes forests from central Chile and western Argentina south to Tierra del Fuego, from sea level to 2,700 m altitude (though birds are rarely observed above 1,000 m)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In significant numbers, the Chilean hawk probably only occurs north to O'Higgins Region, though it at least occasionally breeds in Valparaíso Region, and perhaps also in Coquimbo Region and Fray Jorge National Park from where there are a few sightings

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Populations may decline due to increasing habitat loss from extensive fires, logging pressures, and hunting. It is not evaluated by the IUCN, as they do not consider it specifically distinct, but is included on the CITES Appendix II as part of the blanket listing of Falconiformes
